resources.name: SCEP SPEC-010 Analytics Demonstration
resources.description: Compact SPEC-010 demonstration. Run every request in numeric order to create one active charging scenario, query all Analytics projections, exercise validation observability, and verify Prometheus metrics.

resources.name: SPEC-010 Analytics Demonstration
resources.description: Run all 16 requests in numeric order. The flow creates one fulfilled Reservation with an ACTIVE Charging Session and energy telemetry, exercises every Analytics endpoint, records one validation failure, and checks metric exposition.

resources.name: 01 - Login Administrator and Initialize Run
02 - Create Analytics Facility
03 - Create Station and Connector
05 - Login EV Driver
06 - Create Vehicle
07 - Create Near-Term Reservation
08 - Activate Charging Session
09 - Add Energy Telemetry
10 - Analytics Overview
resources.afterResponseScript:
const body = insomnia.response.json();
insomnia.test('overview summarizes the active scenario', () => { insomnia.expect(insomnia.response.code).to.eql(200); insomnia.expect(body.scope.facility_id).to.eql(insomnia.baseEnvironment.get('facility_id')); insomnia.expect(body.reservations.fulfilled_reservations).to.eql(1); insomnia.expect(body.reservations.pending_reservations).to.eql(0); insomnia.expect(body.charging_sessions.active_charging_sessions).to.eql(1); insomnia.expect(body.energy.total_delivered_energy_kwh).to.eql(1.5); });

resources.name: 11 - Reservation Daily Series
resources.afterResponseScript:
const body = insomnia.response.json();
insomnia.test('reservation aggregate and series are returned', () => { insomnia.expect(insomnia.response.code).to.eql(200); insomnia.expect(body.metrics.total_reservations).to.eql(1); insomnia.expect(body.metrics.fulfilled_reservations).to.eql(1); insomnia.expect(body.series.length).to.be.greaterThan(0); });

resources.name: 12 - Charging Session Hourly Series
resources.afterResponseScript:
const body = insomnia.response.json();
insomnia.test('charging-session aggregate and series are returned', () => { insomnia.expect(insomnia.response.code).to.eql(200); insomnia.expect(body.metrics.total_charging_sessions).to.eql(1); insomnia.expect(body.metrics.active_charging_sessions).to.eql(1); insomnia.expect(body.series.length).to.be.greaterThan(0); });

resources.name: 13 - Occupancy Hourly Series
resources.afterResponseScript:
const body = insomnia.response.json();
insomnia.test('occupancy aggregate and series are returned', () => { insomnia.expect(insomnia.response.code).to.eql(200); insomnia.expect(body.metrics.available_duration_minutes).to.be.greaterThan(0); insomnia.expect(body.metrics.reserved_duration_minutes).to.be.greaterThan(0); insomnia.expect(body.series.length).to.be.greaterThan(0); });

resources.name: 14 - Energy Hourly Series
resources.afterResponseScript:
const body = insomnia.response.json();
insomnia.test('energy aggregate and series are returned', () => { insomnia.expect(insomnia.response.code).to.eql(200); insomnia.expect(body.metrics.total_delivered_energy_kwh).to.eql(1.5); insomnia.expect(body.metrics.sessions_with_energy_data).to.eql(1); insomnia.expect(body.series.length).to.be.greaterThan(0); });

resources.name: 15 - Observe Invalid Analysis Window
resources.afterResponseScript:
const body = insomnia.response.json();
insomnia.test('invalid window returns the documented 400', () => { insomnia.expect(insomnia.response.code).to.eql(400); insomnia.expect(body.detail).to.include('from must be earlier than to'); });

resources.name: 16 - Verify Analytics Metrics
resources.afterResponseScript:
const text = insomnia.response.text();
insomnia.test('SPEC-010 Prometheus metrics are exposed', () => { ['scep_analytics_requests_total','scep_analytics_success_total','scep_analytics_failed_total','scep_analytics_query_duration_seconds','scep_analytics_returned_buckets_total'].forEach(name => insomnia.expect(text).to.include(name)); });
